headline: A Look At Vulcan Materials (VMC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Premium P/E
summary: How Vulcan Materials Stock Looks After Recent Performance With no single headline event driving Vulcan Materials (VMC) today, investors are instead focusing on its recent share performance and fundamentals, including a last close of $291.32 and a market value near $38.1b. See our latest analysis for Vulcan Materials. Recent trading has been a bit choppy, with a modest 1-day and 7-day share price pullback.
